title: Rankett dashboard — 0/100 quality, critical nearly invisible
html:
Rankett client overview rendered for a brand-new (or test) site: share of voice "Not Visible," Quality Score 0/100 ("Critical — Nearly Invisible"), AEO Score 0%, GEO Score 0%, Foundational 90%, with funnel-stage breakdown (Awareness/Consideration/Conversion) — the worst-case "before" state of the engine's scoring.

rankett · share of voice · ai visibility engine · aeo score · geo score
